data.content: Plan needs revision before implementation. Two concrete gaps: (1) /api/waves currently filters dependencies with dep.dependency_type !== 'blocks', but listDependencies emits type='blocks' and dependency_type='blocked_by', so the plan must explicitly fix wave dependency extraction before alias-aware readiness text can work. (2) relationship-picker selected badges only receive selectedIds, so showing aliases there requires a defined data source or prop/interface change; the plan should spell out how selected-id aliases are resolved and tested. Also expand component test coverage to include relationship-picker, since it is part of the proposed view changes.
